homepage.howItWorksSubtitle: Browse thousands of products, bid on exclusive auctions, and get your order delivered — all in just three simple steps.
homepage.howItWorksStep1Desc: Explore thousands of products and live auctions from verified sellers across India.
homepage.howItWorksStep2Desc: Place a bid on auction items or buy instantly at a fixed price with secure checkout.
homepage.howItWorksStep3Desc: Receive your order at your doorstep with real-time tracking and easy returns.
homepage.bannerFallbackSubtitle: Shop top products, bid on exclusive auctions, and find the best prices — all in one place.
homepage.whatsAppTestimonial: Being part of this group helped me discover exclusive deals before anyone else. Absolutely love it!
homepage.realResultsSubtitle: See how real customers transformed their experience with LetItRip
homepage.securitySubtitle: We protect your data with industry-leading security measures at every step
homepage.securityEncryptionDesc: All sensitive data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM — the same standard used by banks and financial institutions.
homepage.securityTransportDesc: Every request is transmitted over TLS 1.3 with certificate pinning, keeping your data safe in transit.
homepage.securityAccessDesc: Role-based security rules ensure only authorized users can access their own data. No client-side database access.
homepage.securityDataDesc: We collect only what's necessary and never store raw sensitive data — encrypted or hashed at rest.

about.title: About LetItRip
about.subtitle: Connecting buyers, sellers, and bidders in one vibrant marketplace
about.missionText: LetItRip was built to democratise commerce — giving independent sellers a powerful platform to reach buyers, and giving buyers access to a diverse catalogue of unique products and exciting live auctions.
about.howBuyersText: Browse thousands of products, place auction bids in real time, and shop with confidence knowing every transaction is protected.
about.howSellersText: Create your seller account, list your products or auction items, and start earning. Our tools make inventory and order management simple.
about.howBiddersText: Join live auctions, set auto-bid limits, and win unique items at prices you decide.
about.valuesTrustText: Every seller is verified and every transaction is monitored for your protection.
about.valuesCommunityText: We nurture a fair, inclusive marketplace where every voice matters.
about.valuesInnovationText: We keep improving our platform based on feedback from buyers and sellers.
about.milestoneFounded: Founded with a vision to simplify multi-seller commerce in India
about.milestoneAuctions: Launched real-time auction engine with auto-bid support
about.milestoneMobile: Mobile-first redesign reaching thousands of new users

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the LetItRip marketplace platform.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using LetItRip
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using the LetItRip platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.useText: You may use LetItRip for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use the platform to post fraudulent listings, harass other users, or circumvent our payment and security systems.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.
terms.sellersText: Sellers are responsible for accurate product descriptions, timely shipping, and honouring return policies. LetItRip reserves the right to remove listings that violate these terms.
terms.auctionsText: All bids placed in auctions are binding. Winning bidders must complete the purchase. Bid manipulation or shill bidding is strictly prohibited.
terms.liabilityText: LetItRip is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, including disputes between buyers and sellers.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: Contact us at legal@letitrip.in for any questions about these terms.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the LetItRip marketplace platform.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us
privacy.introText: LetItRip ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.
privacy.collectText: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, address, payment details) and information collected automatically (device data, usage logs, cookies) to provide and improve our services.
privacy.useText: We use your information to process orders, facilitate auctions, communicate with you, prevent fraud, and improve our platform. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.shareText: We may share your information with sellers to fulfil orders, with payment processors, and with service providers who assist our operations — all bound by confidentiality obligations.
privacy.securityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure access controls, and regular security audits to protect your data.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time from your account settings. You may also opt out of marketing communications.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies to maintain your session, remember preferences, and analyse site usage. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by email or via a notice on our platform.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related queries, contact us at privacy@letitrip.in.

securityPage.metaDescription: Learn how LetItRip protects your personal data with encryption at rest, secure transport, and strict access controls.
securityPage.title: Security & Data Protection
securityPage.subtitle: Your data is encrypted, access-controlled, and handled with care at every layer of our platform.
securityPage.overviewText: LetItRip employs a defence-in-depth strategy: every layer — from transport to storage to application logic — is hardened to protect your personal information.
securityPage.encryptionText: All personally identifiable information (PII) — names, emails, phone numbers, addresses — is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before it is written to our database. The encryption key is stored securely in our server environment and is never exposed to client-side code.
securityPage.blindIndexText: To look up records by email or phone without decrypting every row, we use HMAC-SHA256 blind indices. These one-way hashes let the server find your account instantly while keeping the underlying value unreadable at rest.
securityPage.transportText: All connections between your browser and our servers are encrypted with TLS 1.2+ (HTTPS). API calls, form submissions, and file uploads are never transmitted in plain text.
securityPage.dataMinText: We collect only the data necessary to process your orders and provide our services. Public-facing pages such as product listings and auction feeds never expose seller or buyer PII.
securityPage.accessText: Firestore security rules enforce role-based access: only authenticated users can read their own data, and administrative endpoints require verified admin tokens. Server-side repositories are the sole gateway to the database — no direct client queries are permitted.
securityPage.loggingText: Our structured logging system automatically redacts PII fields before writing to logs. Email addresses, phone numbers, and personal names are never stored in plain text in log output.
securityPage.rtdbText: Live auction feeds and bidding activity shown on the site use anonymised identifiers. Your real name or email is never broadcast in real-time channels.
securityPage.uploadsText: All file uploads are staged locally and submitted to the backend via FormData. The server validates MIME types using magic-byte inspection — not just file extensions — to prevent malicious uploads.
securityPage.csrfText: Server Actions validate origin headers, and all user-generated HTML content is sanitised to prevent cross-site scripting (XSS). API routes use rate limiting backed by Redis to mitigate abuse.
securityPage.complianceText: You can access, update, or delete your personal data from your account settings at any time. For data-related queries, contact us at privacy@letitrip.in.
securityPage.ctaText: Read our full privacy policy or contact us directly with any data protection concerns.

sellersPage.title: Sell on LetItRip
sellersPage.subtitle: Reach thousands of buyers. Your own storefront. Zero hassle.
sellersPage.benefitReachText: Access thousands of active buyers searching for products just like yours.
sellersPage.benefitToolsText: Manage inventory, track orders, run auctions, and analyse your sales — all in one dashboard.
sellersPage.benefitTrustText: Buyer protection and seller verification give customers the confidence to spend.
sellersPage.benefitFeesText: Keep more of what you earn with our transparent, low-fee structure.
sellersPage.step1Text: Sign up for free and complete your seller profile in minutes.
sellersPage.step2Text: Add products or auction items with photos, descriptions, and pricing.
sellersPage.step3Text: Receive orders, ship products, and get paid directly to your account.
sellersPage.faq1A: Payments are deposited directly to your bank account after order confirmation.
sellersPage.faq2A: Yes! You can list products as auctions with a starting bid and end time.
sellersPage.faq3A: Listing is free. We charge a small commission only when you make a sale.

cookies.metaDescription: Learn how we use cookies and tracking technologies on our platform.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: This Cookie Policy explains how LetItRip uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our platform.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you use our platform.
cookies.typesText: We use essential cookies (required for core functionality), preference cookies (to remember your settings and language), analytics cookies (to understand usage patterns), and marketing cookies (to show relevant promotions). You can control non-essential cookies from your browser settings.
cookies.essentialText: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function and cannot be disabled. They include session cookies for authentication, security tokens, and cart state.
cookies.analyticsText: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our platform, which pages are most popular, and where users encounter issues. This data helps us improve your experience.
cookies.marketingText: Marketing cookies help us show you relevant promotions and measure the effectiveness of our advertising. You may opt out of these without affecting core functionality.
cookies.controlText: Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies through their settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality. Refer to your browser's help documentation for instructions.
cookies.thirdPartyText: Some of our service providers (such as analytics and payment processors) may also set cookies. These are governed by their respective privacy policies.
cookies.changesText: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
cookies.contactText: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us via our Contact page.

refundPolicy.metaDescription: LetItRip's refund, return, and exchange policy for purchases.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. Please read our refund policy carefully.
refundPolicy.eligibilityText: Items are eligible for a refund if they are returned within 7 days of delivery in their original condition, unused, and in original packaging. Certain product categories (e.g. perishables, digital goods, customised items) are excluded from returns.
refundPolicy.processText: Log in to your account, navigate to My Orders, select the order, and click 'Request Refund'. Provide a reason and upload supporting photos if applicable. Our team will review your request within 2 business days.
refundPolicy.timelineText: Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days. The amount is credited back to your original payment method. Bank processing times may add an additional 2–3 business days.
refundPolicy.auctionsText: Auction purchases are generally final. Refunds are only available if the item received significantly differs from its description or arrives damaged. Please contact support immediately with photographic evidence.
refundPolicy.exchangesText: We offer exchanges for items of the same value. To request an exchange, follow the same process as a refund request and select 'Exchange' as the resolution type.
refundPolicy.shippingText: Customers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item was defective, damaged, or incorrectly sent. We recommend using a trackable shipping method.
refundPolicy.nonRefundableText: Gift cards, downloadable software, personalised items, and items marked as final sale are not eligible for refunds.
refundPolicy.contactText: If you have any questions about our refund policy or need assistance with a return, please reach out via our Contact page or Help Center.

sellerGuide.metaDescription: Learn how to sell on LetItRip – listing products, running auctions, managing orders, and getting paid.
sellerGuide.title: Seller Guide
sellerGuide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start selling on LetItRip and grow your business.
sellerGuide.gettingStartedText: To become a seller on LetItRip, create a free account, complete your seller profile with business details, and wait for verification (usually within 24 hours). Once approved, you can start listing products immediately.
sellerGuide.listingText: Go to your Seller Dashboard and click 'Add Product'. Fill in the product title, description, category, condition, and price. Upload high-quality photos from multiple angles. Strong titles and detailed descriptions improve search visibility and buyer confidence.
sellerGuide.pricingText: Listing products is free. LetItRip charges a small commission on each successful sale. Auction listings may have different fee structures. Review the current fee schedule in your Seller Dashboard under Settings > Fees.
sellerGuide.auctionsText: You can list eligible items as auctions with a starting bid and optional reserve price. Set a duration between 1 and 14 days. Winning bidders are automatically notified and have 48 hours to complete payment.
sellerGuide.ordersText: When a buyer purchases your item, you will receive a notification. Ship the order within your stated handling time (default 2 business days). Update the tracking number in your order dashboard to keep buyers informed.
sellerGuide.paymentsText: Earnings are held for a short settlement period after delivery confirmation. Payouts are processed to your registered bank account on a weekly basis. You can view your earnings and payout history in the Seller Dashboard.
sellerGuide.policiesText: All sellers must adhere to LetItRip's Seller Code of Conduct: accurate descriptions, prompt shipping, responsive communication, and no counterfeit goods. Violations may result in account suspension.
sellerGuide.supportText: Our seller support team is available via the Help Center. For urgent issues, use the in-platform chat available in your Seller Dashboard.
sellerGuide.onboardS1Desc: Sign up and fill your seller profile
sellerGuide.payoutNote: Platform commission is deducted automatically before funds are released.

trackOrder.metaDescription: Track the status of your orders and shipments in real time.
trackOrder.title: Track Your Order
trackOrder.subtitle: Enter your order ID or tracking number to get real-time updates on your shipment.
trackOrder.signInPrompt: Sign in to your account to view all your orders and their status in one place.
trackOrder.step1Text: Your order is confirmed and the seller is notified to prepare your item.
trackOrder.step2Text: The seller ships your item and updates the tracking number in the system.
trackOrder.step3Text: Your package is on its way. Track it using the tracking number provided.
trackOrder.step4Text: Your order has been delivered. Enjoy your purchase!
trackOrder.needHelpText: If your tracking number isn't updating or your order seems delayed, our support team is here to help.

howItWorks.title: How LetItRip Works
howItWorks.intro: LetItRip is a marketplace where sellers can list products for direct sale or auction. Here's what you need to know:
points: Buyers browse and purchase products directly or place bids in auctions.
You manage your own listings, prices, and inventory.
Payments are processed securely and funds are released after delivery confirmation.
You'll get a dedicated seller store page visible to all buyers.

fees.title: Fees & Commission
fees.intro: We keep our fees simple and transparent:
points: LetItRip charges a flat 5% commission on each completed sale.
No monthly subscription or listing fees — you only pay when you sell.
Payouts are processed within 3–5 business days after delivery confirmation.
Refunded or cancelled orders are not charged commission.

whatYouCanSell.title: What You Can Sell
whatYouCanSell.intro: You can sell most physical goods, but some categories are restricted:
points: Permitted: electronics, fashion, home goods, collectibles, handmade items, and more.
Prohibited: weapons, illegal items, counterfeit goods, and adult content.
All listings must include accurate descriptions and real product images.
Misrepresentation of items may result in account suspension.

auctions.title: Auction Listings
points: Create auction listings with a starting price and reserve (optional).
Buyers place bids on items they want.
Auctions run for a set duration; the highest bidder at close wins.
Winning bids are converted to INR and credited to your payout balance.

responsibilities.title: Seller Responsibilities
responsibilities.intro: As a seller, you agree to the following obligations:
points: Ship orders within the stated handling time and provide valid tracking.
Respond to buyer messages within 48 hours.
Accept returns for items that arrive damaged or significantly not as described.
Keep your listings up-to-date and remove items that are no longer available.
Comply with all applicable laws, including tax obligations in your jurisdiction.

success.title: You're on your way!
success.message: Your seller application has been submitted and is now under review. An admin will evaluate your profile and get back to you soon.
success.note: Your account role will be updated once approved. You may need to sign out and sign back in to access the seller portal.

howAuctionsWork.metaDescription: Learn how LetItRip live auctions work — from placing bids to winning and receiving your item.
howAuctionsWork.title: How Auctions Work
howAuctionsWork.subtitle: LetItRip auctions are open, competitive, and real-time. Here's everything you need to know to participate and win.
howAuctionsWork.step1Text: Browse active auctions on the Auctions page. Each listing shows the current bid, time remaining, bid count, and whether the seller's reserve price has been met.
howAuctionsWork.step2Text: Before bidding, review the minimum bid amount, reserve price indicator, and auction end time. Check the seller's reputation and item condition notes.
howAuctionsWork.step3Text: Enter a bid amount above the current minimum. Watch the countdown and you will be notified if you are outbid.
howAuctionsWork.step4Text: When the auction ends and you hold the highest bid, you have 48 hours to complete payment. If you do not pay within 3 days your bid will be forfeited.
howAuctionsWork.step5Text: When someone places a higher bid you are instantly notified. You are free to bid again or move on to the next auction.
howAuctionsWork.step6Text: After successful payment the seller ships the item within their stated handling time. Track your shipment from the Orders page. Inspect the item on arrival and contact support if anything is wrong.
howAuctionsWork.reservePriceText: Some auctions have a hidden reserve price set by the seller. If the final bid does not meet the reserve, the item is not sold. You will see '⚠ Reserve not met' if the current bid is below the reserve.
howAuctionsWork.autoExtendText: If a bid is placed in the final minutes of an auction the timer may extend by a few minutes. This prevents last-second sniping and gives every bidder a fair chance.
howAuctionsWork.ctaText: Find your next treasure and start bidding on thousands of unique items.
howAuctionsWork.diagramTitle: The auction journey — at a glance
howAuctionsWork.diagramStatusNote: What you might see while an auction is running:
howAuctionsWork.diagramWinningDesc: Your bid is the highest right now. Stay sharp — anyone can outbid you before time runs out.
howAuctionsWork.diagramOutbidDesc: Someone placed a higher bid. You can bid again right away!
howAuctionsWork.diagramForfeitDesc: You won but missed the 3-day payment window. Always pay promptly after winning.

howPreOrdersWork.metaDescription: Discover how LetItRip pre-orders work — reserve upcoming products before they arrive and never miss a launch.
howPreOrdersWork.title: How Pre-Orders Work
howPreOrdersWork.subtitle: Pre-orders let you reserve products before they are in stock. Secure your item early so you never miss a launch.
howPreOrdersWork.step1Text: Browse pre-order listings on the Pre-Orders page. Each listing includes the expected release date, the price, production status, and how many spots remain.
howPreOrdersWork.step2Text: Click 'Reserve Now' and complete checkout. Depending on the seller's configuration, you pay a deposit (typically 20–50%) or the full price upfront. Your order is confirmed instantly.
howPreOrdersWork.step3Text: The seller sources, manufactures, or imports the product. You can track the production status ('Upcoming', 'In Production', 'Ready to Ship') directly on the listing.
howPreOrdersWork.step4Text: On or around the expected release date the seller dispatches your item. You'll receive a notification with your tracking number once it ships.
howPreOrdersWork.step5Text: Your pre-ordered item arrives at your door. If there are any delays, the seller or LetItRip support will notify you via email and in-app notification.
howPreOrdersWork.cancellationText: You can cancel a pre-order before it is dispatched and receive a full refund. Once the item has shipped, standard refund and return policies apply. Deposits may be non-refundable after production begins — check the individual listing.
howPreOrdersWork.sellerDelayTitle: What If the Seller Is Delayed?
howPreOrdersWork.sellerDelayText: If a seller cannot fulfil a pre-order, affected buyers are automatically refunded in full. LetItRip monitors pre-order fulfilment closely and takes action against sellers who repeatedly fail to deliver.
howPreOrdersWork.priceLockText: The price you pay at the time of your pre-order is locked in. If the seller reduces the price before dispatch you will automatically receive the difference as store credit.
howPreOrdersWork.ctaText: Reserve upcoming products now and be the first to receive them.
howPreOrdersWork.diagramTitle: Pre-order status — what you’ll see at each stage
howPreOrdersWork.diagramStatus1Desc: Listing is open. Reserve your spot!

shippingPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about LetItRip's order process, shipping timelines, costs, and how to track your shipment.
shippingPolicy.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPolicy.subtitle: We want your orders to arrive quickly and safely. Here is how our shipping and order fulfilment process works.
shippingPolicy.orderProcessText: Once you complete checkout your order is confirmed and the seller is immediately notified. The seller must prepare and dispatch the item within their stated handling time, usually 1–2 business days.
shippingPolicy.standardText: Standard shipping typically takes 5–7 business days across India. Shipping costs vary by seller and item weight and are displayed clearly at checkout before you pay.
shippingPolicy.expressText: Express delivery (2–3 business days) is available for eligible products. Additional charges apply. Select 'Express' at checkout where the option is displayed.
shippingPolicy.freeShippingText: Many sellers offer free shipping on their listings. Look for the 'Free Shipping' badge on product and auction listings. Free shipping orders follow the same timeline as standard shipping.
shippingPolicy.auctionShippingText: For auction wins, shipping costs and which party pays (buyer or seller) are clearly stated on the auction listing page. Review shipping terms before bidding. Shipping is arranged after successful payment.
shippingPolicy.trackingText: Once your order is dispatched you will receive a tracking number by email and in-app notification. Use the Track Order page to monitor your shipment in real time.
shippingPolicy.internationalText: LetItRip currently ships within India only. International shipping is not supported at this time. Stay tuned for announcements.
shippingPolicy.damagedText: If your order arrives damaged or is lost in transit, contact LetItRip Support immediately with your order ID and photographs. We will investigate and arrange a replacement or refund as appropriate.
shippingPolicy.diagramNote: You’ll see these statuses under ‘My Orders’
shippingPolicy.contactText: Our support team is happy to help. Use the Help Center or Contact page to reach us.

userHub.metaDescription: Manage your LetItRip account, orders, and settings.
userHub.title: My Account

howOffersWork.metaDescription: Learn how to make offers on LetItRip — negotiate directly with sellers and get your item at the price you want.
howOffersWork.title: How Offers Work
howOffersWork.subtitle: Make offers on any product and negotiate directly with the seller. Here's everything you need to know.
howOffersWork.step1Text: Browse listings on the Products or Stores page. Products that support offers will show a 'Make an Offer' button on the listing page.
howOffersWork.step2Text: Look for the "Make an Offer" button on the product page. Not all listings accept offers — it depends on whether the seller has enabled the feature.
howOffersWork.step3Text: Enter your desired price and submit your offer. You can withdraw at any time before the seller responds.
howOffersWork.step4Text: The seller can accept, decline, or send a counter offer within 48 hours. If they counter, you can accept, withdraw, or send your own counter back — your counter must be within 20% (above or below) of the seller's price.
howOffersWork.step5Text: Once an offer is accepted you'll see a 'Checkout Now' button in your Offers page. Add the item to cart at the agreed price and complete payment.
howOffersWork.step6Text: After payment the seller ships within their handling time. Track your shipment from the Orders page. If anything is wrong, contact support immediately.
howOffersWork.rulesItem1: Your counter offer must be within 20% above or below the seller's counter price.
howOffersWork.rulesItem2: You can place up to 3 offers per product. The limit resets automatically if the seller updates the listing.
howOffersWork.rulesItem3: Only one active offer per product at a time. Withdraw your existing offer before making a new one.
howOffersWork.ctaText: Start making offers on thousands of products today.

fees.metaDescription: Understand all platform fees, seller commissions, and gateway charges on LetItRip.
fees.title: Fees & Pricing
fees.subtitle: We believe in complete transparency. Here is a breakdown of every fee on LetItRip — no hidden charges.
fees.platformFeeNote: Charged on the item sale price
fees.gstNote: Goods & Services Tax on LetItRip's commission
fees.offerFeeNote: No fee charged for making or receiving offers
fees.shippingFeeNote: Set by seller; displayed at checkout
fees.tableNote: All percentages are calculated on the final transaction amount including any offers or auction winning bids.
fees.payoutExampleSubtitle: Here's how a ₹1,000 sale breaks down for the seller.
fees.disclaimerText: Fees are subject to change. Current rates will always be displayed here and at checkout before you confirm payment. LetItRip reserves the right to offer promotional fee reductions to eligible sellers at any time.

howCheckoutWorks.metaDescription: Learn how to complete your purchase on LetItRip — from cart to confirmation. Razorpay and COD explained.
howCheckoutWorks.title: How Checkout Works
howCheckoutWorks.subtitle: Placing an order on LetItRip is fast, secure, and flexible. Here is a step-by-step guide to completing your purchase.
howCheckoutWorks.step1Text: Add products to your cart by clicking 'Add to Cart' on any listing. Adjust quantities, apply a coupon code, and review your cart total before proceeding.
howCheckoutWorks.step2Text: Select a saved address or add a new delivery address. If you're shipping to someone else, you'll need to verify consent via a one-time email OTP before proceeding.
howCheckoutWorks.step3Text: Choose from Razorpay (cards, UPI, netbanking) or Cash on Delivery.
howCheckoutWorks.step4Text: Review your full order summary — items, quantities, coupon savings, shipping cost, and total. Click 'Place Order' to confirm.
howCheckoutWorks.step5Text: You'll receive an email and in-app notification confirming your order. Track your shipment from the My Orders page.
howCheckoutWorks.diagramTitle: The checkout journey — at a glance
howCheckoutWorks.paymentMethodsSubtitle: Choose the payment option that works best for you.
howCheckoutWorks.pm1Text: Pay securely with credit/debit card, UPI, or netbanking. Processed by Razorpay — PCI-DSS compliant. Your payment information is never stored on our servers.
howCheckoutWorks.pm2Text: Pay in cash when your order arrives. A one-time OTP confirmation is required when placing a COD order to protect against fraudulent orders.
howCheckoutWorks.ctaText: Browse thousands of products and complete your first checkout in minutes.

howOrdersWork.metaDescription: Understand order statuses, shipment tracking, cancellations, and invoices on LetItRip.
howOrdersWork.title: How Orders Work
howOrdersWork.subtitle: Every order on LetItRip moves through a clear, transparent lifecycle. Here's what each status means and what you can do at each stage.
howOrdersWork.lifecycleSubtitle: Your order progresses through these stages from placement to completion.
howOrdersWork.s1Desc: Your order has been created but payment has not yet been captured. This status applies immediately after placing an order. It resolves automatically once payment is confirmed.
howOrdersWork.s2Desc: Payment was successful. The seller has been notified and will begin processing your order. You'll receive an email and in-app notification.
howOrdersWork.s3Desc: The seller is preparing your items for dispatch — picking, packing, and getting the package ready to hand over to the courier.
howOrdersWork.s4Desc: Your order is on its way! An AWB tracking number has been assigned by the courier. Visit 'Track Order' to follow live shipment updates.
howOrdersWork.s5Desc: The courier has delivered your order. Please inspect your items upon arrival and contact support if anything is damaged or missing.
howOrdersWork.s6Desc: The return window has closed and the order is fully complete.
howOrdersWork.sCancelDesc: The order was cancelled by you or an admin. If payment was made, a refund will be initiated.
howOrdersWork.diagramTitle: Order status flow — from placement to completion
howOrdersWork.trackingText: Once your order is shipped, a tracking link appears on the Order Detail page under 'Track Shipment'. Tracking updates are provided by the courier in real-time.
howOrdersWork.cancelText: You can cancel an order while it is in 'Pending Payment' or 'Confirmed' status. Once the seller starts processing (status moves to 'Processing'), cancellations are no longer available through the platform — contact support.
howOrdersWork.invoiceText: A PDF invoice is available for every completed or delivered order. Open the Order Detail page and click 'Download Invoice'. The invoice includes a breakdown of items, taxes, and payment details.
howOrdersWork.addressText: The delivery address is locked once an order reaches 'Confirmed' status. If you need to change it earlier, cancel the order and re-place it with the correct address.
howOrdersWork.ctaText: Browse thousands of products across all categories and place your first order today.

howReviewsWork.metaDescription: Learn how to write a verified product review on LetItRip and help other shoppers make informed decisions.
howReviewsWork.title: How Reviews Work
howReviewsWork.subtitle: Your opinion matters. LetItRip reviews are from verified buyers — keeping ratings honest and trustworthy for everyone.
howReviewsWork.step1Text: Only users with at least one delivered order containing the product can write a review. This ensures every review is from a genuine buyer — no fake or incentivised reviews.
howReviewsWork.step2Text: Go to the product detail page and click 'Write a Review' in the Reviews tab. A modal will open with a star rating selector, title field, and a text area for your experience.
howReviewsWork.step3Text: After submitting, your review enters 'Pending' status. It is visible to you and the admin team while under review. Moderation typically takes up to 24 hours.
howReviewsWork.step4Text: Once approved by our moderation team, your review appears publicly on the product page. Other shoppers can read it and mark it as helpful.
howReviewsWork.verifiedText: Reviews that link to a confirmed delivered order display a 'Verified Purchase' badge. This badge signals to other buyers that the reviewer actually owns the product.
howReviewsWork.votesText: Any signed-in user can vote a review as 'Helpful' or 'Unhelpful'. Reviews with more helpful votes are ranked higher on the product page so the most useful feedback is easy to find.
howReviewsWork.editText: You can edit your review within 30 days of posting it. Editing resets the review back to 'Pending' status — it goes through moderation again before being re-published.
howReviewsWork.ctaText: Already bought something? Head to your orders and leave a review to help fellow shoppers.

howPayoutsWork.metaDescription: Everything sellers need to know about requesting, tracking, and receiving payouts on LetItRip.
howPayoutsWork.title: How Payouts Work
howPayoutsWork.subtitle: Once your orders are delivered and settled, requesting your earnings is straightforward. Here's the complete payout process.
howPayoutsWork.step1Text: Before you can request a payout, add your bank account details in Seller Dashboard → Payout Settings. Enter your account holder name, bank name, branch, IFSC code, and account number.
howPayoutsWork.step2Text: Payouts are only available for orders that have been delivered and confirmed. Ship orders promptly and ensure the courier updates delivery status so your earnings settle quickly.
howPayoutsWork.step3Text: In the Payouts section of your Seller Dashboard, select the delivered orders you want to include in a payout request. The total must meet the minimum threshold of ₹500.
howPayoutsWork.step4Text: Our team reviews each payout request to verify order statuses and confirm that the earnings are ready for release. This usually takes 1–3 business days.
howPayoutsWork.step5Text: Once approved, the net payout amount (after platform commission) is transferred to your registered bank account via NEFT / UPI. You'll receive an in-app and email notification.
howPayoutsWork.diagramNote: Platform commission is automatically deducted before funds are released.
howPayoutsWork.bankSetupText: You cannot request a payout until your bank account details are saved in Payout Settings. Go to Seller Dashboard → Payout Settings to add your account before making your first request.
howPayoutsWork.minimumText: Each payout request must total at least ₹500. If your pending earnings are below this threshold, accumulate more delivered orders before requesting. There is no maximum limit.
howPayoutsWork.commissionText: LetItRip's commission is automatically deducted from your gross earnings before the payout is processed. The exact deduction is shown in the payout preview on the request screen.
howPayoutsWork.rejectionText: If a payout request is rejected, you will receive a notification with the reason. Common reasons include unverified bank details or disputed orders. Resolve the issue and resubmit from the Payouts section.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.placeholder: Ask me anything about orders, products, sellers…
copilot.errorGeneration: Failed to get a response. Please try again.
copilot.noMessagesDesc: Start a conversation by typing a question above.
